markets.no_sub_title: Vladimir Guerrero Jr.: 5+
markets.rules_primary: If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. records 5+ total hits + runs + rbis in the A's vs Toronto professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026 at 3:07 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Vladimir Guerrero Jr.: 4+
markets.rules_primary: If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. records 4+ total hits + runs + rbis in the A's vs Toronto professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026 at 3:07 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Vladimir Guerrero Jr. is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.rules_primary: If George Springer records 4+ total hits + runs + rbis in the A's vs Toronto professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026 at 3:07 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If George Springer is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If George Springer starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If George Springer is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If George Springer is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Ernie Clement is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.

If Ernie Clement is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Daulton Varsho: 3+
markets.rules_primary: If Daulton Varsho records 3+ total hits + runs + rbis in the A's vs Toronto professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026 at 3:07 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Daulton Varsho is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Daulton Varsho starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Daulton Varsho is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Daulton Varsho is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
